description: Auto-managed signal filter thresholds. Updated by pipeline_executor.py when backtest metrics cross thresholds.

changes_log.change: Initial config — baseline values from Week 1 fix v2
changes_log.rationale: Seeding from manually-tuned values after Week 1 signal quality fix

Research Iter 28: TP1=10% is mathematically unattainable within 2h window — 90.9% expiry rate despite 81.8% win rate. Tokens reach only ~5.5% avg PnL. Lowering TP1 to 5.5% to match actual price action.

changes_log.change: Lowered min_quality_score from 0.60 to 0.50; lowered tp1_pct from 5.5% to 1.5%, tp2_pct from 25% to 3.0%
changes_log.rationale: Research finding (2 consecutive iterations): direction accuracy 88.9% but only 22.2% reach TP targets — 5.5% TP is 3-4x too aggressive for 90-min window. min_quality_score=0.60 blocking all publication (0 signals/24h). Lowering quality threshold to restore flow; reducing TP targets to match actual 90-min price action.

changes_log.change: Lowered min_buy_usd from 100 to 0 (disabled); lowered volume_spike_min from 1.0 to 0.3
changes_log.rationale: Root cause found: amount_usd is computed as token_quantity*token_price (not SOL_spent*sol_price), so 4-5 SOL trades show amount_usd=0.008-1.02, blocking all signals. Also lowered volume_spike_min to 0.3 — SM_10 (Tier 1, 83% WR) was buying at 0.4x volume (below 1.0x threshold). Smart money buys BEFORE volume spikes; filtering on this is counterproductive for Tier 1.

changes_log.change: Reduced TP targets to 0.8%/1.5%/5.0%; tightened SL to 3.0%
changes_log.rationale: Research finding (2 consecutive iterations): signals are profitable (88.9% WR, 5.96% avg PnL) but TP targets structurally unreachable (22.2% TP hit rate). Prices consolidate to 5-6% by expiration rather than spiking to hit 1.5%/3.0% levels — consolidation window mismatch. New TP1=0.8% and TP2=1.5% match the observed price action range. SL tightened from 15% to 3% to cut losing trades faster. SM_10-only allocation already enforced by publisher quality scoring (Tier 1 = 60pts base; other single wallets max 35pts, below 50-point gate).
